description: Projects watched by the HQ Watchdog. Each entry is one project the watchdog ingests commits, sessions, and (optionally) lessons for. claude-hq is the default project — used as fallback when no project is specified, but holds no special status in the code.

projects.name: claude-hq
projects.notes: Primary HQ orchestration brain. Watched since the watchdog was first built.

projects.name: POLYMARKET_TRADING_3.0
projects.notes: Polymarket trading bot. name MUST match the directory basename so session-file ingestion (which uses basename) finds rows. display_name is the friendly label used in alerts. lessons_path null per Decision Log Option A — repeated_mistake_signal scoped to claude-hq lessons only for v1.
